title: SQL: WHERE A.x LIKE A.y misses results
poc: select a.x as x, b.x as y from a,b;
select x from a,b where x LIKE y;
select x from a,b where x ILIKE y;
key_bug_features: LIKE comparison case sensitivity in SQL queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a (x VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, y VARCHAR(10));
CREATE TABLE b (x VARCHAR(10) UNIQUE, y VARCHAR(10));
SELECT a.x, b.x FROM a JOIN b ON a.y LIKE b.y WHERE a.x ILIKE b.x;
